one_liner: TSLA at $406.55 is 85% above DCF fair value ($59), trading at 192x forward PE with earnings July 22 — Parkev holds puts; avoid unless you're in for the SpaceX acquisition optionality or robotaxi regulatory catalyst.

price_action.vol_rank: Below average — moderate volume on +3.17% day
price_action.intraday_story: TSLA gapped up from $394 and ran to $407.86 before closing at $406.55 near the session high on below-average volume. Stock is above EMA50 ($391.93) and EMA200 ($384.88). The close is near the upper Bollinger Band at $429.50.

news_catalyst.headline: Tesla Q2 Deliveries Beat; Earnings July 22 — Forward PE at 192x vs $59 DCF Fair Value
news_catalyst.summary: Tesla's 3.17% gain continues the recovery from earlier weakness. Parkev Tatevosian published an updated 2026 price target today (July 10) raising the upside scenario slightly to $350-450 but maintaining the sell rating with put options held. The robotaxi remains in limited testing. Earnings July 22 will be watched for: Q3 delivery guidance, energy storage commentary, and any SpaceX acquisition update.

technical.summary: TSLA is above both EMAs in a technical uptrend. RSI 53.8 is neutral. The stock is approaching the upper BB at $429.50 — the next resistance target. Technical picture is mildly bullish but the fundamental picture is extremely bearish. For a momentum-only trader, the setup could work to $429; for any fundamental investor, the 85% DCF overvaluation and 192x PE is unattractive.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Neutral Wyckoff with stock above both EMAs. No accumulation or distribution signals. Earnings July 22 is the decisive event.

valuation.summary: DCF fair value $59 vs $406 market price — 85% overvalued. The entire bull case rests on robotaxi commercialization and SpaceX acquisition optionality, not current operations. Avoid for fundamental investors.

key_strengths: EV market share leader in US
Elon Musk's unique ability to sustain premium valuation
key_concerns: Grade D (0.48) — reflects extreme valuation vs fundamentals
Robotaxi still in limited testing — primary bull catalyst not materializing
fundamentals.summary: D grade reflecting the enormous gap between price and fundamental value. The Musk premium is real but quantifying it is speculative.

risks: Earnings July 22 — any setback to robotaxi timeline or delivery guidance cut would gap down significantly
Elon political re-engagement (elections) is the #1 downside risk per Parkev's analysis
Robotaxi commercial launch delay means the 192x PE multiple has no fundamental anchor
